title: [MTR] MVV Addon
description: This ressource pack adds the A-Wagen from the Munich Ubahn to the MTR mod.
body:
The MVV Pack is a Ressource Pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod and currently adds the A-Wagen of the Munich U-Bahn to the game.
It should be compatible with the upcoming MTR 4.0.0 version.

This is my first model for the MTR mod and still a work in progress. Please leave your feedback!

Planned Improvements:
- Destination Display
- Detailed Bogie
- Better Textures
